extension.description: Database management tool for VS Code — browse schemas, run queries, and inspect data across PostgreSQL, Redis, and ClickHouse.
view.connections.name: Connections
view.queryHistory.name: Query History
config.defaultPageSize.description: Default number of rows per page when viewing table data.
config.safeMode.description: Safe mode: auto-add LIMIT to SELECT queries without one, run EXPLAIN to detect Seq Scans.
config.safeMode.warn: Warn on Seq Scan, auto-add LIMIT (default)
config.indexHintThreshold.description: Minimum estimated row count to show missing index warnings. Tables smaller than this are ignored.
config.confirmEdits.description: Show SQL and ask for confirmation before saving inline edits to the database.
